nasb.text: The mouth of an adulteress is a deep pit; He who is cursed of the Lord will fall into it.

esv.text: The mouth of forbidden women is a deep pit; he with whom the Lord is angry will fall into it.

cnv.text: 淫婦的口是深坑， 耶和華所惱恨的必陷在其中。

ccb.text: 淫妇的口是深坑， 耶和华憎恶的人必陷进去。

csbs.text: 淫妇的口，是深深的坑； 耶和华所恼怒的人，掉进那里。
